response.justification: The candidate has relevant experience in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, with a strong background in full-stack development and cloud technologies.
strengths: Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators
Strong full-stack development skills with TypeScript and Node.js
Proven ability to lead technical projects and contribute to open-source initiatives
concerns: Limited direct experience with vector databases and RAG architectures
No explicit mention of experience with major cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure)
Lack of specific examples of LLM performance metrics and optimization techniques
